ham.subject: Congratulations! You have been awarded the XYZ Scholarship
ham.body:
Dear Student,

We are pleased to inform you that you have been selected as a recipient of the XYZ Scholarship for the upcoming academic year. Your award covers a total of $5,000 towards tuition and related fees.

Please review the attached scholarship agreement and submit the required documentation by March 15th to confirm your acceptance.

You can access the scholarship materials at the following link: <URL>

Should you have any questions, feel free to contact the Financial Aid Office at aid@university.edu.

Best regards,
Alex Martinez
Financial Aid Coordinator
University of Somewhere

spam.subject: URGENT: Verify Your Account for Immediate $10,000 Crypto Reward
spam.body:
Dear Valued Investor,

Your digital wallet has been flagged for potential fraudulent activity. To secure an instant $10,000 bonus for using our new crypto platform, you must confirm your identity within the next 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in account suspension and loss of funds.

User ID: 987654321
Amount: $10,000

Please click here to verify your account: <URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Security Team
CryptoWorld Services
